title: A typical day for a Software Engineer might include...
step1: You might spend time writing new code to build cool features for websites or apps.
You'll often test your programs to make sure everything works perfectly and catches any mistakes.
You could meet with your team to share ideas and plan out what new parts of a project to work on next.
You might also fix any glitches or "bugs" in existing software to make sure users have a smooth experience.
